principal_investigator.name: Nutth Tuchinda
principal_investigator.bio: Nutth is an assistant professor in the CME department at NJIT (starting Fall 2025). He completed his PhD with Prof. Chris Schuh at MIT (2019–2023), then worked as a postdoc in the Schuh and Olson groups at MIT before joining NJIT.

graduate_students.name: Md. Hasib
graduate_students.bio: BS in Mechanical Engineering (2025), Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology (BUET). Enjoys walking, hiking, teaching, and solving math problems.

graduate_students.name: Fahmid Faiyaj Chowdhury
graduate_students.bio: Fahmid Faiyaj Chowdhury completed his B.S. in Mechanical Engineering from Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET). He has taken an interest in the world of materials science and how his skills in computational tools and coding can be used for advancing materials research. In his free time, he likes to immerse himself in playing video games.

undergraduate_students.name: David Onyegbule
undergraduate_students.bio: David Onyegbule is an undergraduate student at New Jersey Institute of Technology majoring in Chemical Engineering. With a growing background in clean and renewable energy, he is driven to explore this academic path through research.

undergraduate_students.name: Thomas Stephen Amburan
undergraduate_students.bio: Thomas Stephen Amburan is a second-year undergraduate student studying Materials Science and Engineering at the University at Buffalo. He enjoys watching basketball and playing sports in his free time.

undergraduate_students.name: Tucker Erbeck
undergraduate_students.bio: Tucker is a visiting student who recently completed a B.S. in Chemical Engineering from the University of Southern California. He enjoys running, swimming, and working on 3D printing projects.

high_school_students.name: Could be you!
high_school_students.bio: High-school students interested in computational materials science are welcome to inquire about summer and short-term projects.

alumni.name: Could be you!
alumni.bio: Group alumni will be listed here as members move on to their next roles.
